name: W3D6 GTC Survival Floor Workout
description: Boredom-busting floor workout for streaming training at home. 4 blocks: barre burn, plyo sweat, push-up party, core destroyer. Do blocks between sessions or all at once if you're dying of boredom. Will make you sweat.

exercises.notes: Deep wide stance, tiny pulses at the bottom. Feel it in inner thighs immediately.
Plie down, rise onto toes at the top. Calves + quads + balance.
15 each side. All fours, kick up and pulse. Glute fire.
15 each side. All fours, knee out to the side. Hip abductors.
Explode up, soft landing. This is where you earn the sweat.
Fast but controlled. Drive knees to chest.
Wide stance jump — land soft in plie. Barre meets plyo.
Only 6, but make them count. Full extension at the top.
Hands together under chest. Tricep destroyer.
Plank to push-up position and back. Alternating arms.
In plank, drive knee to elbow. 5 each side. Core + hip flexors.
Slow and controlled. Opposite arm/leg extends. Lower back stays glued to floor.
20 total (10 each side). Elbow to opposite knee.
Arms overhead, legs hovering, rock like a banana. If you can't rock, just hold.
In plank, rotate hips side to side. 6 each side. Oblique fire.

tips: Do all 4 blocks for a full 25-min sweat session, or cherry-pick blocks between training streams
Block 1 (barre) is sneaky hard — the pulses accumulate fast
Block 2 (plyo) is where you'll actually sweat — push the pace
Block 3 (push-ups) builds on your bench press gains — you're stronger than you think
Block 4 (core) — hollow body rocks are humbling. Just try.
Rest day tomorrow — go hard if you want to
